title: ANC - UI
scenario: Transparency Environment and Speech sub-settings are disabled/greyed out when ANC/Adaptive is ON by default
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap on ANC to open the ANC screen.
Observe the default state of the ANC screen.
expected: The ANC screen displays two sections: ANC (with Adaptive and Standard options) and Transparency (with Environment and Speech options). By default, ANC/Adaptive is ON, Transparency/Environment is OFF, and all Transparency values are disabled/greyed out.
